---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Alpha Scanner
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome 130, Firefox 135, Safari 18]
- **Node.js:** [e.g. 22.x]
- **Alpha Scanner version:** [e.g. commit hash or tag]
- **Deployment:** [e.g. local dev, Vercel, Railway, Docker]

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (error logs, network tab, console output).
